title: Triple blend 001199 001198 001193
summary: Blend two CatBoost-corrected variants with the n_ens32 RealMLP variant.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Produce pred_001199, pred_001198, and pred_001193. Set final predictions to 0.60 * pred_001199 + 0.30 * pred_001198 + 0.10 * pred_001193. Avoid learned stacking.
expected_effect: Combine confirmed public-positive CatBoost corrections with a cleaner stronger RealMLP component.
risk: The extra component may increase complexity without adding independent ranking signal.
